title: UnDercontrol Project Resource
description: Schema for Project YAML resource files. Projects are first-class entities that boards can reference for cwd, git remote, and other workspace configuration.

cwd.description: Working directory path. Used as fallback cwd when a board references this project and has no explicit projectDir in its metadata.

git_remote_url.description: Optional git remote URL for the project repository.

cwd_resolution.description:
CWD resolution chain when launching a workspace session:
1. Frontend explicit input (user types a path)
2. Task metadata 'cwd' field
3. Board metadata 'projectDir' field
4. Board's linked project.cwd (this entity)
5. User preference syncPath
6. Fallback: '~' (home directory)

The project.cwd serves as the lowest-priority board-level default, allowing boards to override via their own metadata.projectDir.

example.description:
Example project YAML:

apiVersion: ud/v1
kind: Project
spec:
  name: UnDercontrol
  description: Main product repository
  cwd: /home/user/projects/undercontrol
  git_remote_url: https://github.com/oatnil-top/undercontrol.git
